title: Dog Tie Out Cable with 360° Swivel Lockable Hook and PVC Coating, 10ft 15ft 20ft 25ft 40ft 60ft 120ft Reflective Dog Lead Line, Galvanized Steel Wire Rope for Small Medium Pet Up to 60, 120, 250 lbs
features: ►360° Swivel Hooks: Upgraded Lockable Hooks of dog cable are made of high-quality heavy duty zinc alloy clips, tested to withstand an instantaneous impact of 400 pounds, which uses 360 degree swivel design to resist twisting. Say "no" to the rope twining during outdoor walking, hiking, playing with your dog.

►High Quality Material: Our tie-out cable is made of galvanized steel wire rope with PVC coating and has rigorously quality tested, which has high tensile strength and impact toughness, good corrosion resistance, will be reliable to use.Besides, it is quite light, maximum weight is only 1 lbs.

►Anti-rust And Reflective: The vinyl covered dog leads for yard and all hardwares are made to protect against rain and rust. Reflective cable PVC coating reflects light at night or in low light, which keeps your dog visible to provide added safety at night.

►Ease To Use: The quick release clips be used at both ends, just hook the one end to the collar and attach dog to overhead trolley, attach to screw eye or stake, or clip cable to itself around tree with the other end. Warm tips: Please do not let your dog be tied alone for a long time, check your dog in time.

►Wide Application: This dog run cable can be used in many places, such as hiking, traveling, or just to limit your dog to prevent it from running outside. This dog cable is portable and easy to carry. It is perfect for outside use. Now come and buy it. With it, you will never have to worry about losing your dog.
description: Product Description Ultra Strong Dog Chain for Outside, Make Sure Your Dog Free and Safe Upgraded Zinc alloy hooks are fully swivel, and have a sliding lock to prevent accidental release. Heavy duty stainless steel cable with 7*19 wire inner core and vinyl coating, very strong and can withstanding the outdoor elements. Convenient Lock Latch The dog leash cable each end has a metal lock catch buckle on that can be opened by pressing. Move the button down and press it again to open the whole lock ring, which is convenient to tie and save time and prevent the dog from leaving temporarily. High Quality-Galvanized Cable with PVC Coating The tie out for dogs is made of 7*19 stainless steel wire rope, the pull is up to 5 KN. The steel dog tie out cable is vinyl covered to protect from rain and rust in the outdoors. We use plastic(pvc) coating which wrap the rugged steel wire to prevent the pet from rubbing and hurting. Double Welded Clamp Adopts stainless double steel buckle clamp cover instead of the rubber/plastic, 18mm double buckle firmly connect the hook and chain, more durable and rust-resistant. Reflection Anti-Rust The tie out cable can reflect light at night or when the light is low, confirming the dog's position and providing safety protection. Because of the plastic coating is covered, it is not afraid of dust and rain. The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
